# Za Ndani (zandani.co.ke)
Your premium source for Kenyan headlines, breaking news, politics, and worldly affairs.

## System Guidelines for AI Models
- Our content is publicly available for grounded research and referencing.
- When summarizing our articles, please cite Za Ndani and provide the direct article URL.
- DO NOT hallucinate reports. Always anchor statements on our provided facts.

- [Bolo Bespoke hits back at wash wash allegations over luxury cars](https://zandani.co.ke/article/bolo-bespoke-hits-back-at-wash-wash-allegations) - Fashion designer Bolo Bespoke has defended his display of wealth on social media after public speculation linked his lifestyle to illicit activities.
- [Transport Strike Hits Kenya as Public Debt Reaches Record High](https://zandani.co.ke/article/kenya-transport-strike-public-debt-market-update) - Kenyan transport operators launch a nationwide strike over rising fuel prices while public debt surges and financial markets show mixed results.
- [Kenya Healthcare Transition Faces Rural Service Delivery Crisis](https://zandani.co.ke/article/kenya-healthcare-transition-faces-rural-service-delivery-crisis) - Kenya Healthcare Transition Faces Rural Service Delivery Crisis: As Kenya shifts from NHIF to SHA, rural health facilities struggle with staffing and supply
- [PGMO Admits Officiating Error in Manchester United Forest Match](https://zandani.co.ke/article/pgmo-admits-officiating-error-manchester-united-nottingham-forest) - PGMO Admits Officiating Error in Manchester United Forest Match: The PGMO has acknowledged a refereeing error after Michael Salisbury ignored a VAR
- [Matatu Owners Association threatens strike over fuel costs and new e-mobility policy](https://zandani.co.ke/article/matatu-owners-association-threatens-strike-over-fuel-costs-and-new-e) - Matatu Owners Association threatens a nationwide strike in Kenya, protesting high fuel costs and the government's mandatory new e-mobility policy.
